problem id: 782dfb49
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  00010110 -> 00001000
  01110101 -> 10101010
  00110001 -> 00000000
  11000001 -> 10000000
  00111111 -> 00011110
  11110000 -> 01100000
  11011000 -> 00100000
  11100001 -> 11000000
  10011110 -> 00001100
  01000010 -> 00000000

query: 01010111
predicted answer: 10101010
